auth_access_intro: Manage login level and protected actions for this workstation.
auth_permission_notes_body:
Viewer: basic access
Admin: configuration and maintenance access
Factory: full privileged access
auth_view_description: Limited configuration access. Use login actions to unlock protected features.
auth_admin_description: Configuration and maintenance access is enabled. Factory login is still available for restricted tasks.
auth_factory_description: Full privileged access is enabled, including password management and protected maintenance actions.
auth_passwords_saved: Administrator and factory passwords have been updated.
auth_admin_required: Administrator permission is required for this action.
auth_factory_required: Factory permission is required for this action.
restore_default_confirm:
Restore all built-in default products from backup?
Custom added products will be kept.
restore_default_success: Built-in default products have been restored.
logo_replace_tooltip: Double-click to replace the logo (factory password required).
logo_replace_format_hint:
Supported formats: PNG, JPG, JPEG, BMP.
Recommended: transparent PNG, close to 252 x 62 px.
table_lead_dist_tooltip: Distance from previous node, in meters (m).
table_interval_dist_tooltip: Spacing within the same device group, in meters (m).
diag_ok: System Diagnosis: Loop configuration is normal
diag_length_over: Total cable length ({value:.1f}m) exceeds system limit ({limit:g}m)
aux_over_message: The panel AUX 24V output allows a maximum load of 200mA. It has been reset automatically.
qty_warning_message:
The total device count ({total}) exceeds the loop limit ({limit}).
The maximum allowed for this row is: {max_allowed}
total_devices_over_message: The current total device count ({total}) exceeds the loop limit ({limit}).
add_failed_message: The current loop has reached its address limit ({limit}) and cannot add more devices.
new_loop_message: Reuse the current loop's base settings?
choose_copy_loop: Select loop to copy settings from:
close_loop_keep_one: At least one loop must remain.
close_loop_message:
Close {tab_name}?
All configuration data in this loop will be lost.
clear_config_message:
Clear all configurations?
All loop and device data will be removed.
admin_category_in_use: This category still has products. Delete or move them first.
admin_delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete {name}?
